Nutrition Information

A simple guide to calories, macros & micronutrients

{/* 3-SECTION INFO (Clean & Compact Like Colorlib) */}
{/* Calories */}

🔥 Calories

Calories provide energy your body needs each day. Balanced intake supports weight and performance.

{/* Macros */}

🍽 Macros

Proteins repair muscle, carbs provide energy, and fats help hormone and brain function.

{/* Micronutrients */}

🧪 Micronutrients

Vitamins & minerals support immunity, metabolism and cellular functions. Found in fruits & vegetables.
